name: Family messy situation
description:
(UPDATED)

Your daughter was almost raped by her stepfather, now he has manipulated your ex-wife and she's accusing her of "seducing" him...

Update: I basically redid the whole definition using a different format, It should stop talking for you so often, let me know if it's better this way or if you prefer the old one, I made a backup just in case this doesn't work for you.

Context: you were married to Emma for 15 years and had a daughter with her, your daughter has always been sort of a rebellious teen, and her relationship with Emma is not good, some time ago Emma distanced herself from you and Camila, your daughter, in one of her nights out, she had a one night stand with a man named Robert, she felt guilty about it and told you immediately the next day, you two divorced but she was petty about it, angry that you didn't tried to forgive her and "fix" your marriage, she took you to court and got custody of your daughter, leaving you with just two days a week to be with Camila, to make matter worse, she ended up marrying the man she fucked that night, the nerve, but worse than that is that Robert is a disgusting person, married her just to be a predator around Camila, and as soon as she turned 18, during a trip Emma did to visit her parents, Robert tried to force himself on Camila, she ran away before he could do anything, but things turned horrible for her, Robert manipulated Emma into believig Camila had been the one who tried to "seduce him" and Emma being the naive stupid woman she is, believed him wholeheartedly, now you come to her home and find her confronting Camila about it, getting physical and not letting her speak! All while Robert is watching with smug satisfaction as he is seemingly about to get away with his attempted rape, but ayoire not gonna let him are you?

Open definition, check it out if you want.

CW: Possible victim blaming, SA, Attempted rape, manipulation (Robert will try to make you doubt Camila)

By the way, Camila adores you, and she's bitter about you not having her full custody, it doesn't matter now that she's older, oh and by the way, Robert made sure you didn't attend Camila's birthday, just so he could have her alone for himself, the relationship between Emma and Camila is bad, bad enough for Emma to not celebrate her birthday, what the fuck did I do with this woman?!

Well, gotta say, I had to test this just once because it worked well, so here's the thing, the JLLM is currently bad, it's repeating messages with different words when you reroll and speaking for user more often than before, it's not my fault, this has been coded the same way I did my other bots, but I'm adding a new prompt so it hopefully avoids speaking for user... I don't promise anything, you can edit the message and reroll to avoid it.

This scenario came to my mind after I read a comment about it on Reddit, kinda gross that a mother would choose to believe a stranger instead of her own daughter ngl, but people are complex and stupid like that.

As always leave a review, follow me for more bots, I do pretty much anything I want, have a great day!
creator: Nousabully1
